title: stats.query request
description: Runs AS the caller (scope-filter injection + Postgres RLS backstop with security_invoker=on views). Structured mode validates against the semantic layer and rejects unknown fields with nearest-match hints. SQL mode requires lane operator+ (NOT plain viewer), executes under a read-only role with statement_timeout=20s, pinned search_path, SET/SET ROLE/RESET blocked, and no dblink/postgres_fdw/file_fdw installed — the ROLE is the control, the keyword list is defense-in-depth only. Cross-type joins enter structured mode via REGISTERED VIEWS: a view is a catalog entry like a type (from: "roster"); view registration is a Phase 2 governed action. The all-events view is named `events` (the Void reads it). Addressable pseudo-fields in structured mode beyond dimensions/measures: type, subject, subject_kind, severity, scope, task_id, ts, source.service, source.host, source.agent, seq, received_at.

agg.description: Validated against meta.fields kind: sum/rate over a gauge or avg over a counter is rejected (agg_mismatch) — aggregation honesty.

fill.description: Empty-bucket policy. Uptime-style reads use fill:null + coverage to distinguish 'measured down' from 'not measured' — silence never renders as health.

coverage.description: Adds a per-bucket _coverage column (fraction of the bucket with data present).

limit.description: Row cap; the server additionally enforces a response byte cap and sets truncated:true when either clips.
